### CONFIRMED — Boston Celtics -14.5

- Match: Boston Celtics vs Philadelphia 76ers | Tip: 2026-04-21T23:00Z
- Pick: BOS -14.5 | Scout odds: 1.92 | Commit odds: 1.92 | Move: Spread tightened 1pt (–14.5 → –13.5 available), odds +0.01 (negligible)
- ML: 1.12 (BOS) / 6.40 (PHI) | ATS: –13.5 (1.93/1.90) current market | O/U: N/A
- Stake: €269.00 | Pot: €516.48 | Conf: 67/100 | EV: 0.2864
- Decision: Both anchor players confirmed (Embiid OUT, Tatum available). Line moved slightly against (1pt spread tighter) but odds essentially unchanged. EV remains extremely strong at 0.29. BOS L15 NetRtg gap (+33.7 vs PHI) is elite; PHI without franchise player at home for BOS is a decisive edge. Confirming at Scout odds with confidence adjusted –5 for minor adverse movement.

---

### CONFIRMED — San Antonio Spurs -11.0

- Match: San Antonio Spurs vs Portland Trail Blazers | Tip: 2026-04-22T00:00Z
- Pick: SAS -11.0 (improved from drafted -11.5) | Scout odds: 1.92 | Commit odds: 1.91 | Move: Spread improved 0.5pts (easier cover), odds –0.01
- ML: 1.15 (SAS) / 5.60 (POR) | ATS: –11.0 (1.91/1.91) | O/U: N/A
- Stake: €269.00 | Pot: €513.79 | Conf: 65/100 | EV: 0.2415
- Decision: Both anchor players confirmed (Lillard OUT, Wembanyama available). Spread actually improved (–11.5 → –11.0, easier to cover); odds dropped only 0.01. EV strong at 0.24. SAS has highest L15 NetRtg of all teams tonight (+38.8); POR without Lillard severely depleted. Confirming at current odds with confidence adjusted –5 for minor adverse odds movement.

---

### LATE SCOUT — Los Angeles Lakers vs Houston Rockets — REJECTED

- Decision: Kevin Durant listed QUESTIONABLE triggers confidence –10 on HOU pick. Adjusted confidence 52 produces negative EV (–0.022) at HOU –5.0 (1.88). ML options both out of valid range. No valid bet available for this game.

---

**Slate Summary:** Two picks confirmed totalling €538.00 (30.0% of €1,792.94 bankroll) — well within the 70% exposure cap. Both picks hinge on confirmed franchise-player absences (Embiid OUT for PHI, Lillard OUT for POR) against elite home teams with top-tier L15 NetRtg. The LAL vs HOU game could not be confirmed due to Kevin Durant's questionable status driving EV negative after the mandatory confidence adjustment. Both confirmed picks carry strong EV (0.29 and 0.24 respectively), with the BOS spread tightening 1pt and the SAS spread improving 0.5pts since Scout time.
